description.content: List supported languages

item.name: Resolve all translations for a language

request.name: Resolve all translations for a language

description.content: Resolves all translations for a language by merging custom and default values; returns 200 even when only defaults exist (404 only if neither custom nor default exists for the requested scope).

variable.description: (Required) Language tag in canonical BCP 47 format (e.g., `en-US`, `es`, `fr-CA`).
